underlying_goal: Debug and monitor a ~20% language swap issue in their real-time interpretation pipeline where Scribe returns the wrong language, by capturing partial transcripts for analysis
friction_detail: Claude initially proposed solutions that assumed independent language verification was possible (user corrected this), external bot reverted changes causing re-application work, and a force push accidentally landed commits on main instead of the PR branch causing CI failures.
brief_summary: User wanted to investigate Scribe's ~20% language swap issue by storing partial transcripts on turns; Claude implemented the full feature across migration, models, channels, specs, and Avo, then fixed CI/git issues through several iterations.
